name: FlexRayRcvStatusEvent
title: FlexRayRcvStatusEvent
syntax: FlexRayRcvStatusEvent (long msgTime, int channel, long statusType, long infomask1, long infomask2, long infomask3);
description: This function is a callback and is called by the tool!
The callback occurs when the FlexRay Communication Controller (CC) has synchronized with the bus or the synchronization fails.
